steps.speaker: Jiraiya
steps.text: So the brat wants to chase Sasuke down. Guts alone won't cut it. Welcome to Mount Myoboku, kid.
For weeks you balance, you fail, you balance again — learning to draw in the natural energy of the mountain itself.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: I can feel it... the whole mountain breathing with me. This is it — SAGE MODE!

steps.speaker: Jiraiya
steps.text: Heh. Faster than I ever did. Take this Forbidden Scroll — when Naruto reaches his prime, it'll seal the form for good. Now go get your friend back.
